creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/eresources/#eresources-mailfiltering>: 

> C.2.4. Filtering on the Mailing Lists

> … If an email contains both an HTML and a plain text version, 
> the HTML version will be removed. …

Not so, at least not for freebsd-questions. 

Please see, for example, the two content types text/plain and text/html at <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2022-June/001399.txt>
